# uv

> uv is an extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

You can use uv to install Python dependencies, run scripts, manage virtual environments,
build and publish packages, and even install Python itself. uv is capable of replacing
`pip`, `pip-tools`, `pipx`, `poetry`, `pyenv`, `twine`, `virtualenv`, and more.

uv includes both a pip-compatible CLI (prepend `uv` to a pip command, e.g., `uv pip install ruff`)
and a first-class project interface (e.g., `uv add ruff`) complete with lockfiles and
workspace support.

When fetching documentation, use explicit `index.md` paths for directories, e.g.,
`https://docs.astral.sh/uv/concepts/projects/dependencies/index.md`. This returns
clean markdown instead of rendered HTML with JS/CSS.


## Getting started

- [Installation](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/getting-started/installation/index.md)
- [First steps](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/getting-started/first-steps/index.md)
- [Features](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/getting-started/features/index.md)

## Integrations

- [Docker](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/docker/index.md)
- [Jupyter](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/jupyter/index.md)
- [marimo](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/marimo/index.md)
- [GitHub Actions](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/github/index.md)
- [GitLab CI/CD](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/gitlab/index.md)
- [Pre-commit](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/pre-commit/index.md)
- [PyTorch](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/pytorch/index.md)
- [FastAPI](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/fastapi/index.md)
- [Bazel](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/bazel/index.md)
- [Azure Artifacts](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/azure/index.md)
- [Google Artifact Registry](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/google/index.md)
- [AWS CodeArtifact](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/aws/index.md)
- [JFrog Artifactory](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/jfrog/index.md)
- [Renovate](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/renovate/index.md)
- [Dependabot](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/dependabot/index.md)
- [AWS Lambda](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/aws-lambda/index.md)
- [Coiled](https://jiezhi.github.io/dochub/uv/guides/integration/coiled/index.md)
